summary: Proof-worth registry entries owned by toolkit.

entries.contract: Toolkit controls dictation state, strict canonical voice-envelope parsing, and explicit legacy bridge adaptation stay aligned for control-surface consumers.
entries.worth: This prevents permissive envelope parsing or toolkit control state from drifting away from the frozen voice schema and renderer bridge.

entries.contract: Toolkit input normalization uses the checked browser-safe validator generated from the canonical input schema, accepts only exact input-region and identity-complete canvas-origin forms, and gives consumers one normalized projection.
entries.worth: This prevents toolkit consumers or app policy from reviving retired wrapper and top-level compatibility or losing input ownership when routed event shapes change.
entries.guard: generated-artifact check plus pure parser and normalization units over every frozen input-event-v2 fixture; no live daemon or input tap

entries.contract: Spatial Telemetry receives and records canonical raw-v2 input delivered directly to its live canvas through an isolated daemon.
entries.worth: This proves the live component boundary accepts canonical raw-v2 input without claiming coverage of daemon subscription fanout.
entries.guard: uses isolated AOS_STATE_ROOT and skips when Accessibility is unavailable

entries.contract: The browser-safe input validator is compiled from the canonical input-event-v2 schema with Ajv standalone, has no runtime compiler dependency, and agrees with frozen valid and invalid fixtures.
entries.worth: This catches stale generated validation or schema disagreement; implementation-source routing remains owned by workflow-rules.json.
entries.guard: compiled-artifact and schema units; no daemon, input tap, or canvas

entries.contract: Utility surface lifecycle creation, suspension, duplicate recovery, and non-collision create failures stay bounded to toolkit state.
entries.worth: This catches broad canvas-create recovery drift without needing a live daemon or visual harness.
entries.guard: fake host only; no live daemon

entries.contract: Surface Inspector launcher creates a URL-backed canvas and waits for live lifecycle plus display geometry readiness.
entries.worth: This catches WebView import, content-root, canvas placement, and Surface Inspector readiness failures that Node-only tests miss.
entries.guard: requires live AOS readiness or explicit --allow-start; not part of broad default loops

entries.contract: Wiki Subject Browser launcher creates a graph-first workbench canvas with subject search, filters, and details refs.
entries.worth: This catches content-root, fixture, and workbench boot failures not covered by package-local logic tests.
entries.guard: requires live AOS readiness and repo/toolkit content roots; not part of broad default loops

entries.contract: Step Descriptor Workbench launcher opens fixture-backed descriptor and evidence state in a URL-backed canvas.
entries.worth: This catches fixture handoff and workbench boot failures beyond schema validation alone.
entries.guard: requires live AOS readiness and toolkit content root; not part of broad default loops

entries.contract: Artifact Bundle Workbench launcher opens a fixture-backed artifact subject in a URL-backed canvas.
entries.worth: This catches artifact fixture projection, repo content-root, and workbench boot failures outside Node-only checks.
entries.guard: requires live AOS readiness and repo/toolkit content roots; not part of broad default loops

entries.contract: Work Record Workbench launcher opens fixture-backed Work Record state in a URL-backed canvas.
entries.worth: This catches Work Record workbench boot and fixture loading failures not covered by schema tests alone.
entries.guard: requires live AOS readiness or explicit --allow-start; not part of broad default loops
